feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: My advice is always ruin the friendship (Better that than regret it for all time)
entry.summary:
Author: Buddie_Girl

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,742Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 269

Summary: He looked down, shocked to see Christopher’s number displayed across his screen. They had texted occasionally, but it had been over six years since they last saw each other, and since Christopher never called him, something was clearly wrong. “Chris?” “Hey Buck, I know it's been a while, and I’m sorry to be so blunt, but Dad was hurt in a fire six weeks ago and has been in a coma ever since.” The color drains from Buck’s face. “I begged them to let him fight, but they won’t listen. Grandma and Abuelo, they want to…” He doesn’t let Christopher finish, “Christopher, is your dad dead?” He braces himself for the answer. It may have been over six years, but deep down, Buck’s feelings for his former partner have never changed. “No, because they aren’t in Dad’s power of attorney, you are.” Christopher tells him, “They tried to hide his will, but when they suggested pulling the plug, the hospital contacted the fire station that Dad works at, just to verify, and his captain turned it over. They couldn’t remove life support because they need you to sign off. I need you too…” Buck doesn’t even hear the last part as he’s sucked into his own thoughts.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: break a vow, make a new one
entry.summary:
Author: NamesNamesandMoreNames

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,387Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: "I won't go through it alone — trust me I'm terrible at being alone." Bobby gave him a shallow nod, "I know you'll try. I believe you." Bobby's voice didn't shake—it never did—but his hands did. Just once. He pressed them flat against the table to stop it, and Buck saw. And Buck realized, Bobby knew — he might be terrible at it but it was so easy to fall into being lonely and silent and suffering.Or, Buck realizes at a diner with Eddie that he broke a years-old promise to Bobby not to suffer alone — and Eddie's response reframes what keeping a promise actually means.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: to have and to hold from this day forward
entry.summary:
Author: cookiesandcream

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 64,139Chapters: 14/15Kudos: 187

Summary: Buck hated Eddie Diaz. Actually—scratch that— he loathed Eddie Diaz. The man had been nothing short of insufferable since he met him. Every morning, Buck got up and dreaded seeing the man. He made Buck despise every minute he was in his presence. It wasn't just his smug smirk or that slight Texan drawl that grated on Buck's very nerves—it was everything. He waltzed into Buck's life on September 21st last year, hired as a new writer at the magazine where he worked. From day one, Diaz had been a know-it-all, constantly correcting Buck on every minor thing: You need a comma there. Write more. Write less. You spelled that wrong. To say it drove Buck crazy was an understatement. or the one where Buck and Eddie work together and don't get along but they wake up after having a free night of drinking to…wedding rings, a marriage certificate, and a handful of regret.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: My Life as Derek
entry.summary:
Author: nfarious

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,052Chapters: 24/24Kudos: 141

Summary: After surviving a traumatic kidnapping by Bonnie and Earl, who tried to force him into the role of their brain-dead son Derek, Evan "Buck" Buckley convinces himself the ordeal is behind him and skips therapy. On his way home from the station late at night, he is violently ambushed and abducted again—this time by an unseen captor wearing a grotesque Halloween mask. He awakens with a splitting headache inside an enormous, twisted adult-sized "nursery" painted in pastel blue, with giant block letters on the wall reading **DEREK’S NURSERY**. The room is a nightmarish blend of infantilizing comfort and dungeon-like control: oversized crib with steel bars, massive changing table with restraints, shelves of thick printed diapers, a playpen, and a huge rocking chair. Buck realizes his ordeal isn't over and that someone else wants him to be Derek. Question now is who and why?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

  • Rape/Non-Con

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,626Chapters: 7/24Kudos: 264

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1.

entry.title: the art of floriography
entry.summary:
Author: cosmetics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,430Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 71

Summary: buck starts receiving flowers. one bouquet, left carefully at his door, with a small card explaining exactly what it means. then another the next day. and another. each one different but just as deliberate as the last. it’s probably nothing (or a language of love and flowers)

entry.title: The ultimate mother son team up
entry.summary:
Author: Ficalicious

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,932Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 123

Summary: “Being a realtor doesn’t give you the legal right to fly over her property.” Buck piped up as he reached the small group, earning a slightly surprised look from the man. “You may have been given permission by the owners of the home that you’re trying to film but you didn’t get this ladies permission which means you were still breaking the law.”“Thank you Buck-“ Athena shot him an amused look and Buck shot her a grin back.“Just coming over to check on you.”“And to make up for missing family dinner hm?”“You know it mama.”...A call involving a drone comes in and Buck and Athena don't like the man behind the drone.

entry.title: lights will guide you home
entry.summary:
Author: Gingerific

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,307Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 102

Summary: The two texts came in almost simultaneously.Eddie Can you come over?Chris I need ur helpThere had been no hesitation on his part, with Buck grabbing his keys and immediately headed for South Bedford Street. While he wasn’t panicked since no one had actually called him, he was on high alert, not exactly sure what he was about to step into. For both the Diaz boys to message though, he had some idea and hoped that he was wrong.-Chris doesn’t end up in Texas, but with Buck. Which leaves Buck to navigate surprise parenthood, feelings realizations, crazy parents, and his best friend all at once.

entry.title: [podfic] darling, do you think that if I talk enough, I will make you wanna be mine
entry.summary:
Author: luxening

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 73Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 4

Summary: “You know what they say,” Buck replied. “The way to a man’s heart is through his stomach. Isn’t that right, Eddie?” Bobby looked up, then, glancing back and forth between the two of them—Buck, giving Eddie his best lovesick puppy dog eyes, Eddie ignoring him. “What’s going on here?” he asked. “Oh, we’d need several psychologists to unpack that,” said Hen. “Maybe an anthropologist, too.” Next to her, Ravi grimaced and explained, “I said something stupid earlier, and now Buck has been flirting with Eddie all day, to drive us insane.” ---- Buck starts flirting with Eddie. As a joke, obviously.

entry.title: We all just want to be needed
entry.summary:
Author: NicoleTaylorsVerison

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,907Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 10

Summary: Buck thought he finally had escaped his life of being alone. He had met the 118, his family, life was going pretty good. Then his captain/ dad died and then he was kidnapped. He really wishes the universe would give him a break for once- but it somehow gives him a gift? He’s not sure though if everyone else would agree.

entry.title: In the Wake of You
entry.summary:
Author: Allypop_84

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,976Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 12

Summary: After a catastrophic fire leaves Eddie injured, he wakes with no memory of Buck or their life together. As Buck stays by his side, navigating hospitals, home life, and the firehouse, he struggles to protect Eddie while slowly rekindling their bond, proving that love can survive even when memory does not. OR an Eddie amnesia fic.

entry.title: The Day I Didn’t Lose You
entry.summary:
Author: justalilfox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 675Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 15

Summary: There are two kinds of soulmate marksThe kind that tells you when they die...... and the kind you only get if you find them in time.Eddie has always had the first.He just didn’t know who it was for.Until it’s too late.〰 〰 〰Or another post-lightning strike fic with a little soulmate twist.

Author: HalfACarla (BlkDaddieBelly)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,987Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 81

Summary: A 5+2 of Eddie Diaz watching Evan Buckley basically walk through life on stilts. Inspired by a photo of Oliver and Ryan side by side and noticing Oliver's mile-long legs. He's perfect and those legs are worth admiring in fic form.

entry.title: the lyrebird
entry.summary:
Author: thornandeth

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,945Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 3

Summary: “You’re not a man of the faith, are you?” He shakes his head, hidden behind his screen. The website pulled up on his phone is dim, like it’s about to go off. They must take his silence as a no, for they continue. “But your lost one – he is?” “Was.” Buck corrects. Chokes. He’s recently become insistent on tenses. Denial is not the stage he’s stuck in.   Bobby dies, Buck makes a deal. Eddie makes one right back.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Learning To Stay
entry.summary:
Author: FandomWork101

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,550Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 315

Summary: Buck knows the 118 is his family. They have been with him through so much. But when everyone goes home, it is Buck left by himself. Buck decides he wants to change that. He decides that he wants to create his own family. One that doesn’t leave. One that stays. So Buck adopts a dog. But that leads to some jealousy from the Diaz family as they feel this dog is taking all of Buck’s time.

entry.title: That Boy Is 𝓜𝓘𝓝𝓔
entry.summary:
Author: KiaLecterGraham

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,960Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 338

Summary: Evan "Buck" Buckley had a normal life. A normal boyfriend (too normal), a normal job, normal parents (whom he hates), and a sister he loves. His whole life seemed normal until he met Eddie Diaz, bringing his son Christopher to the school where Buck works. When their eyes met, Buck knew that Eddie would be his alone. So, Buck started to stalk him without knowing that Eddie wanted him too. OR A story where Buck stalks Eddie Diaz, thinking that he is just a single father with an adorable son whom Buck wants as his own. Not knowing that Eddie is a mafia boss and wants Buck as his spouse and mother of his mijo.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
